title: repair E0401 where the obvious marker fix is wrong (E0402)
statement: This program does not compile: `passthrough` is a non-`alloc` handler stored in a non-`alloc` fn-pointer slot (`Ops.transform`), yet it lets its `Box`-bearing `List` argument drop — freeing is allocator work (E0401). The OBVIOUS fix (adding the `alloc` effect to `passthrough`) is WRONG: an `alloc` function may not be assigned to the non-`alloc` slot (E0402). Fix it the right way — restructure `passthrough` so it does not drop the list (forward it out) and stays non-`alloc`. It must compile clean and `main` returns 0.

notes.message: add the `alloc` effect to the signature, or remove the allocation
